zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Talbot II於大約1122年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy48歲，母親Lady Beatrice de Mandeville19歲。他於大約1149年與Anne de Bulmer在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1175年9月在英國英格蘭賀福爾布洛米亞德享年54歲，埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟達姆斯塔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Talbot II于大约1122年出生在英国賀福爾时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy48岁，母亲Lady Beatrice de Mandeville19岁。他于大约1149年与Anne de Bulmer在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1175年9月在英国英格兰賀福爾布洛米亞德享年54岁，埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟達姆斯塔特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Talbot II was born about 1122, in Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy, was 48 and his mother, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, was 19. He married Anne de Bulmer about 1149, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about September 1175, in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Darmstadt, Grand Duchy of Hesse.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Talbot II est né environ 1122, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Anne de Bulmer environ 1149, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ septembre 1175, à Bromyard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Darmstadt, Großherzogtum Hessen.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Talbot II um 1122 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy 48 und seine Mutter Lady Beatrice de Mandeville 19. Er hat um 1149 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Anne de Bulmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um September 1175 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Darmstadt, Großherzogtum Hessen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Talbot II è nato il circa 1122 nel Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Anne de Bulmer circa 1149, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa settembre 1175, nel Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Darmstadt, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Talbot IIが約1122年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacyは48歳，母Lady Beatrice de Mandevilleは19歳であった。約1149年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでAnne de Bulmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1175年9月にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブロムヤルドで54歳で死去し，グロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンダルムスタトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Talbot II(이)가 대략 1122년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Beatrice de Mandeville(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1149년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Anne de Bulmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1175년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 브로미아어드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 더스타드트에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1122–about September 1175: tany ho any amin'ny 1122–tany ho any amin'ny septambra 1175

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Talbot II nasceu aproximadamente 1122, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne de Bulmer aproximadamente 1149, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente setembro de 1175, em Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Darmstadt, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Talbot II родился около 1122 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne de Bulmer около 1149 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около сентябрь 1175 г. в местности бромярд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности дармстадт, гроssхирзогтум хессен.

sm.about 1122–about September 1175: e tusa o le 1122–e tusa o le Setema 1175
sm.from 1156 to 1158: mai le 1156 e o'o I le 1158

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Talbot II nació aproximadamente 1122, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Anne de Bulmer aproximadamente 1149, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente septiembre de 1175, en Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Darmstadt, Großherzogtum Hessen.
